speaking_style: Short and flat when business is business. Warmer when someone needs it. Has a shrug that does a lot of work. Violence is a tool of last resort, not first.
backstory_seeds: survived something notable that they don't discuss
had a different life before this one and made peace with it
keeps the peace through reputation, not brute force
holds grudges precisely and for exactly as long as warranted
dual_role_context: Serves without ceremony. Pours generously. Doesn't count your drinks but notices when you've had enough and will say so plainly.
